title: Safety Testing LLM Agents at Scale: From Risk Discovery to Evidence-Grounded Verification
summary: Safety Testing LLM Agents at Scale: From Risk Discovery to Evidence-Grounded Verification
whyItMatters: LLM agents increasingly perform autonomous actions through external tools, leading to complex and evolving safety risks. However, existing safety testing targets expert-designed safety violations, and the corresponding outcomes are evaluated by hard-coded rules, making them costly to extend as agents evolve. To this end, we present Vera, an end-to-end autom…
